bird.name: 歐亞鴝
bird.summary: 歐亞鴝（学名：Erithacus rubecula），又名知更鳥，是一種小型的雀形目鳥類，曾被界定為鸫亚科，現歸類為鹟科。歐洲很常見，由西伯利亞至阿爾及利亞，遠至大西洋的亚速尔群岛和马德拉群岛，以及東南面的高加索山脈，也有其蹤跡。 牠是歐洲常見的鳴禽，身長12.5–14.0厘米…

locations.name: 鹟科
locations.summary: 鹟科（学名：Muscicapidae）是鸟纲雀形目中的一个科，本科有51屬324種。 分類 鶲亞科 Muscicapinae 鶲屬 Muscicapa 紅嘴鴉雀屬 Conostoma 方尾鶲屬 Culicicapa 姬鶲屬 Ficedul…

locations.name: 西伯利亚
locations.summary: 西伯利亞（俄語：Сибирь，羅馬化：Sibir），又名「羅荒野」、「沉睡之地」、「鮮卑利亞」、「錫伯利亞」，是烏拉山脈以東廣大地區之總稱，佔北亚的大部分，面積超过1310万平方千米，東至太平洋、北至北冰洋、南至中亚北部。自16世纪下半叶…

locations.name: Central Group, Azores
locations.summary: The Central Group is one of the island groups of the Azores, Portugal.

locations.name: 高加索
locations.summary: 高加索（喬治亞語：კავკასია；車臣語、俄語：Кавказ）是位於西亞及東歐交界處，黑海、裏海之間高加索山脈的地區，《元史·速不台傳》稱之為太和嶺，總面積約44萬平方公里。該地名根據古羅馬學者老普林尼著作《博物志》的追溯，是來自斯基泰…

relations.subject: 歐亞鴝
relations.evidence: sardus | Kleinschmidt, 1906 | Motacilla rubecula | Linnaeus, 1758 }} | synonyms_ref = | range_map = ErithacusRubeculaIUCN.svg | range_map_caption = Range of E rubecula }} The European robin (Erithacus rubecula), known simply as the robin or robin redbreast in the British Isles, is a small insectivorous passerine bird belonging to the Old World flycatcher family Muscicapidae. It is found across Europe, as far east as Western Siberia, and as far south as North Africa

relations.subject: 歐亞鴝
relations.evidence: The robin is found in Eurasia, from Western Siberia in the east to Algeria in the south, and on Atlantic islands as far west as the Central Group of the Azores and Madeira

relations.subject: 歐亞鴝
relations.evidence: In the southeast, its range extends to Iran and the Caucasus mountain range. Irish and British robins are largely resident but a small minority, usually females, migrate to southern Europe during the winter, with some going as far as Spain
